ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchups" (
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchup */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the matchup */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the matchup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchup */,
  "odds" TEXT /* Odds associated with the matchup */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Predicted outcome of the match */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the prediction (correct/incorrect) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Time the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Prediction model used */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction (0.00-1.00) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., enthusiast, gambler, professional) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, view prediction, update profile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the model (0.00-1.00) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_prediction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchup */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Time the prediction was made */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the prediction (correct/incorrect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)
column_names: Role of the user (e.g., enthusiast, gambler, professional)
Type of activity (e.g., login, view prediction, update profile)
Unique identifier for each history entry
